mdq:check.name: Resource Creator Present
mdq:check.description: Check that at least one creator/author is specified for the dataset.
mdq:check.code:
def call(): global output global status global creator
import metadig.variable as mvar
# Check if creator exists if 'creator' not in globals() or creator is None: output = "No dataset creator/author was found." status = "FAILURE" return False
# Convert to list if single value if isinstance(creator, str): creator = [creator]
# Filter out empty values valid_creators = [] for c in creator: c_str = mvar.toUnicode(c) if not mvar.isBlank(c_str): valid_creators.append(c_str.strip())
if len(valid_creators) == 0: output = "Creator field exists but all values are blank." status = "FAILURE" return False
# Success if len(valid_creators) == 1: output = f"1 creator found: {valid_creators[0][:50]}" else: output = f"{len(valid_creators)} creators found: {', '.join(valid_creators[:3])}" if len(valid_creators) > 3: output += f", and {len(valid_creators) - 3} more"
status = "SUCCESS" return True

dialect.name: ISO 19115 and ISO 19115-2 / ISO 19139 and ISO 19139-2
